# uptimekuma_notification_smseagle (Resource)

SMSEagle notification resource. SMSEagle is an SMS gateway solution that supports SMS, MMS, ring calls, and text-to-speech calls.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# SMSEagle notification using API v2 with phone number recipient
resource "uptimekuma_notification_smseagle" "sms" {
  name           = "SMSEagle SMS"
  url            = "https://192.168.1.100"
  token          = "your-api-token"
  recipient_type = "smseagle-to"
  recipient_to   = "+1234567890"
  msg_type       = "smseagle-sms"
  api_type       = "smseagle-apiv2"
  is_active      = true
  is_default     = false
}

# SMSEagle notification with voice call (ring)
resource "uptimekuma_notification_smseagle" "ring" {
  name           = "SMSEagle Ring"
  url            = "https://smseagle.example.com"
  token          = "your-api-token"
  recipient_type = "smseagle-to"
  recipient_to   = "+1234567890"
  msg_type       = "smseagle-ring"
  duration       = 15
  api_type       = "smseagle-apiv2"
  is_active      = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Notification name
- `recipient_type` (String) Recipient type: `smseagle-to` (phone number), `smseagle-contact` (contact ID), or `smseagle-group` (group ID)
- `token` (String, Sensitive) API access token for authentication
- `url` (String, Sensitive) SMSEagle device URL (e.g., https://192.168.1.100)

### Optional

- `api_type` (String) API version: `smseagle-apiv1` or `smseagle-apiv2`
- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `duration` (Number) Duration for voice calls in seconds
- `encoding` (Boolean) Enable unicode encoding for non-ASCII characters
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `msg_type` (String) Message type: `smseagle-sms`, `smseagle-ring`, `smseagle-tts`, or `smseagle-tts-advanced`
- `priority` (Number) Message priority level (0-9, where 9 is highest)
- `recipient` (String) Recipient identifier for API v1 (phone number, contact ID, or group ID)
- `recipient_contact` (String) Contact recipient ID(s) for API v2 (comma-separated for multiple)
- `recipient_group` (String) Group recipient ID(s) for API v2 (comma-separated for multiple)
- `recipient_to` (String) Recipient phone number(s) for API v2 (comma-separated for multiple)
- `tts_model` (Number) TTS voice ID/model for text-to-speech calls

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
